#  What user roles can view which types of RFIs? 
##  Background 
Users may require specific roles on an RFI (or granular permissions) to view the RFI depending on the RFI's status and privacy settings.
##  Answer 
Users may require specific roles on an RFI (or granular permissions) to view the RFI depending on the RFI's status and privacy settings.
In the table below, the ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon indicates which user roles can view an RFI based on its status and privacy settings, and the ![Icon Delete X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1c18d7f16e57f4e8e0e6c7ce765a2275/b035fb0139aa509801e58a49859ac2fa/icon-delete-x.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon indicates which user roles cannot view an RFI based on its status and privacy settings.  
| Creator  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)1  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| Assignee  | ![Icon Delete X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1c18d7f16e57f4e8e0e6c7ce765a2275/b035fb0139aa509801e58a49859ac2fa/icon-delete-x.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Delete X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1c18d7f16e57f4e8e0e6c7ce765a2275/b035fb0139aa509801e58a49859ac2fa/icon-delete-x.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)2  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)3  |  
| Distribution List Member  | ![Icon Delete X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1c18d7f16e57f4e8e0e6c7ce765a2275/b035fb0139aa509801e58a49859ac2fa/icon-delete-x.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Delete X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1c18d7f16e57f4e8e0e6c7ce765a2275/b035fb0139aa509801e58a49859ac2fa/icon-delete-x.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)2  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)3  |  
| No Role  | ![Icon Delete X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1c18d7f16e57f4e8e0e6c7ce765a2275/b035fb0139aa509801e58a49859ac2fa/icon-delete-x.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Delete X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1c18d7f16e57f4e8e0e6c7ce765a2275/b035fb0139aa509801e58a49859ac2fa/icon-delete-x.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)1  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)2  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)1  |  
| Tool Admin  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |  
1 Users with the ['View Private RFIs Associated to Users within Same Company' granular permission](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/grant-granular-permissions-in-a-project-permissions-template) enabled on their permissions template can view any RFI marked 'Private' if another user in their company (including them) is the RFI's creator or is designated as the RFI Manager.
2 Assignees, Distribution List Members, and users without a role on the RFI can only view a closed RFI not marked 'Private' if the RFI was previously open.
3 Assignees, Distribution List Members, and users without a role on the RFI can only view a closed RFI marked 'Private' if the RFI was previously open OR if they have the ['View Private RFIs Associated to Users within Same Company' granular permission](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/grant-granular-permissions-in-a-project-permissions-template) enabled on their permissions template and another user in their company (including them) is the RFI's creator or is designated as the RFI Manager, an Assignee, or a Distribution List members.
